Safe_Walkway_Violation.description: Person detected outside green-marked designated safe walkway boundaries.
Safe_Walkway_Violation.observable_indicator: Person position beyond green walkway boundary.
Safe_Walkway_Violation.detection_approach: YOLO person detection plus green floor boundary overlap, with dataset-label fallback.
Safe_Walkway_Violation.tier_justification: Frequent unsafe deviation with injury potential; escalates near machinery or forklift operation.

escalation_rules.rationale: Pedestrian is within one meter of active machinery.
Walkway breach occurs during forklift operation.

Unauthorized_Intervention.description: Person without authorization indicators is interacting with equipment.
Unauthorized_Intervention.observable_indicator: No/incorrect vest plus hand or body proximity to operating equipment.
Unauthorized_Intervention.detection_approach: Person detection, vest color check, and hand-equipment proximity heuristic.
Unauthorized_Intervention.tier_justification: Direct manipulation of equipment without clearance creates immediate injury risk.

escalation_rules.rationale: Multiple unauthorized personnel compound the equipment hazard.

Opened_Panel_Cover.description: Electrical or machine panel cover is left open during operations.
Opened_Panel_Cover.observable_indicator: Panel door visible in open state.
Opened_Panel_Cover.detection_approach: Panel state classifier or template matching, with dataset-label fallback.
Opened_Panel_Cover.tier_justification: Open panel is hazardous but escalates with duration or personnel proximity.

escalation_rules.rationale: Panel has remained open for more than five minutes.
Personnel are near an exposed panel.

Carrying_Overload_with_Forklift.description: Forklift is carrying three or more blocks, exceeding the policy threshold.
Carrying_Overload_with_Forklift.observable_indicator: Block count on forklift forks is greater than or equal to three.
Carrying_Overload_with_Forklift.detection_approach: Forklift and block counting detector, with dataset-label fallback.
Carrying_Overload_with_Forklift.policy_signal: CRITICAL SAFETY NOTICE - explicit overload threshold.
Carrying_Overload_with_Forklift.tier_justification: Vehicle instability can cause immediate severe injury or equipment damage.
